identity.name: Guerrero Academy
identity.mission: To forge the next generation of football talent in the Dominican Republic with discipline, passion, and elite training.

primary.description: Deep Navy - The anchor. Use for backgrounds in hero, footers, and primary text.

secondary.description: Slate 100 - Use for section backgrounds to break up white space.

accent.description: Turf Green - Use for 'Success', 'Sign Up' buttons, and active states.

highlight.description: Champion Gold - Use sparingly for trophies, 'Pro' tags, and special offers.

layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary hover:bg-slate-50 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-md
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-green-600 shadow-lg hover:shadow-green-500/30 transition-all font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 rounded-md

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 border border-slate-100 shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 hover:shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl group
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6

inputs.default: h-12 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on dark backgrounds to prevent banding.

instructions_to_main_agent: THEME SETUP: Use the Deep Navy (#020617) as the primary brand color in tailwind.config.js.
LANDING PAGE: Build a high-impact 'Hero' section with the 'hero_background' image, dark overlay, and 'Oswald' typography.
LANDING PAGE: Use 'Bento Grid' layout for the 'Why Choose Us' section.
FORMS: Use Shadcn components but style them with the 'premium' input styles defined in guidelines.
DASHBOARD: Keep it clean, white backgrounds, 'Manrope' font for high legibility, and use 'Badge' components for status (Active/Pending).
ANIMATION: Use 'framer-motion' for entrance animations on the landing page (fade-up, stagger-children).
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text on top of images has a semi-transparent black overlay or text-shadow.
DO NOT use gradient text for headings unless it is a very specific 'Gold' highlight.
DO NOT make the site look like a 'Video Game'. It should look like a 'Professional Institution'.
